---
title: "Setting up R for Network Analysis"
format: html
previous:
  href: "../index.qmd"
  text: "Home"

next:
  href: "R-install_RStudio.qmd"
  text: "Installing R and RStudio"
---

## Learning outcomes

By the end of this unit, learners will be able to:

-   set up R and RStudio for use\
-   install and load required packages\
-   recognise the role of packages across the workflow\
-   prepare their environment for the training exercise

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
